extraInfo: Backend, DevOps, and AI/ML at PuppyDog.io. I built a mass personalization engine scaling from 10 to 10,000+ prospects per job, led a hybrid AWS→GCP migration that cut infrastructure cost by 36%, and lifted backend test coverage from 0 to ~75% — shifting releases from every two weeks to daily. I design around Node.js, Python, AWS, GCP, and agentic LLM workflows, and lean on Datadog for observability. Off the clock you’ll find me hiking , plotting chess moves , or rewatching Game of Thrones . Strong CS foundation, bias for shipping — open to ambitious teams in Europe or North America.
